summary: The diff implements the three requirements: REQ-1 (remove external redirects), REQ-2 (in-website session auth), and REQ-3 (update AuthChangeBanner). Most requirements are satisfied, but REQ-1 has a partial gap regarding the comprehensive audit scope. The caffeine.ai link in SiteFooter uses target='_blank' which matches the AC allowance. REQ-2 and REQ-3 appear fully implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit all navigation links, buttons, and anchor tags across the entire frontend and remove or replace any href, window.location, or navigate calls that point to external URLs.
missing_requirements.reason: Only 14 files are modified and the diff shows no evidence of a comprehensive audit across all frontend files. The SiteFooter still retains an external href to caffeine.ai (though with target='_blank' which the AC permits). No evidence of auditing other unmodified components for window.location or raw external anchor tags.

hallucinated_features.description: useSessionAuth implemented with a purely client-side localStorage-based user store using a non-cryptographic hash function, rather than wiring to the existing backend canister session-auth system.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement specifies using the 'existing session-auth system' and that all backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo. The implementation uses localStorage with simpleHash and in-memory user storage, bypassing the backend entirely.
